title: Pan-Seared Tofu with Asian-Style Sauce
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring pan-seared tofu in a sweet and savory Asian-style sauce.

ingredients.name: marination
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a store-bought or homemade marination sauce suitable for Asian-style dishes.

ingredients.name: fold
ingredients.notes: Assuming you are using lettuce leaves as the fold for serving.

instructions: 1. Cut the tofu into small cubes and set aside.
2. In a shallow dish, whisk together the marination and 2 tablespoons of water.
3. Add the tofu to the marinade and mix well to coat.
4. Let the tofu marinate for at least 15 minutes, flipping halfway through.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Remove the tofu from the marinade, allowing any excess to drip off.
7. Add the tofu to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
8. Serve the tofu in the center of a lettuce leaf, garnished with your favorite toppings.
